bead.title: exec: migrate AgentRunner interface to (ctx, rcfg, runtime) signature
bead.description:
Stage 2 prereq for B22.

Migrate cli/internal/exec/store.go's AgentRunner interface (and its DDx-side cmd/exec wrapper) from the legacy RunOptions parameter to (ctx, ResolvedConfig, runtime) signature. Updates the exec definition execution path to construct ResolvedConfig from config + flag overrides before dispatching.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/exec/store.go (AgentRunner interface + implementation)
- cli/cmd/exec*.go (wrapper)
- Test updates

Out-of-scope:
- agent/internal helpers (B22d)
- Server handlers (B22c)
- Final type deletion (B22)
bead.acceptance: field AgentRunner interface signature changed. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/exec/... passes. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... passes for exec command path.
